proposals.rationale: HBM is now broadly recognized as the binding memory chokepoint for AI accelerators: SK Hynix, Micron and Samsung have reported HBM capacity effectively sold out through the year with pre-committed volumes, and the trade has been a consensus long for multiple quarters. The scarcity is real but the 'medium / under-appreciated' framing no longer holds — it is now well-priced into the memory names. Reassess priced_in medium -> high; bind window and the non-consensus flag are unchanged (the binding is still now, but it is no longer a non-consensus call).
sources: SK Hynix Q1 earnings call: HBM sold out for the year, capacity pre-committed
Micron 10-Q: HBM revenue ramp, multi-quarter customer commitments
Multiple sell-side notes flagging HBM as a crowded consensus long
